originalTitle: Xbox turmoil continues with a studio closure and executive departures
summary: Last week, Xbox boss Asha Sharma sent a memo warning of an Xbox "reset" ahead of expected layoffs, and today, Kotaku reported that Xbox plans to shut down Compulsion Games, the studio behind South of Midnight. Since taking over in February, Sharma has made some big decisions, including cutting the price of Xbox Game Pass […]
content: Last week, Xbox boss Asha Sharma sent a memo warning of an Xbox “reset” ahead of expected layoffs, and today, Kotaku reported that Xbox plans to shut down Compulsion Games, the studio behind South of Midnight. Since taking over in February, Sharma has made some big decisions, including cutting the price of Xbox Game Pass and making Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution Xbox console exclusives. But in their “reset” memo, Sharma and chief content officer Matt Booty discussed many challenges facing the Xbox business, including that it has “over extended” with its studio system: > We are the fortunate stewards of industry-defining franchises that have enormous potential and player demand, but we have not adequately funded them to compete and win. At the same time, as we saw this past weekend at Showcase, a reliable pipeline of first- and third-party exclusives and new IP are critical to our success. We need to reassess the balance between these and our investment priorities for the next 5 years. Last week, my colleague Tom Warren reported that Xbox’s changes could “involve a studio closure, or changes to the Xbox studio lineup.” Xbox didn’t immediately reply to a request for comment. The company’s head of Xbox Game Studios, Craig Duncan, and the Xbox Game Studios chief of staff, Louise O’Connor, also announced that they will be leaving, The Game Business reported. Duncan, who formerly headed up Rare, took over the role in October 2024. In May, Sharma reorganized the Xbox platform team, including bringing in some execs that she had formerly worked with on Microsoft’s CoreAI team.
chineseTitle: 随着工作室关闭和高管离职，Xbox 动荡仍在继续
chineseSummary: 上周，Xbox 老板阿莎·夏尔马 (Asha Sharma) 发出了一份备忘录，警告 Xbox 将在裁员之前“重置”。今天，Kotaku 报道称，Xbox 计划关闭《South Midnight》背后的工作室 Compulsion Games。自二月份上任以来，Sharma 做出了一些重大决定，包括降低 Xbox Game Pass 的价格 [...]
chineseContent: 上周，Xbox 老板阿莎·夏尔马 (Asha Sharma) 发出了一份备忘录，警告 Xbox 将在预计裁员之前“重置”。今天，Kotaku 报道称，Xbox 计划关闭《South Midnight》背后的工作室 Compulsion Games。自二月份上任以来，Sharma 做出了一些重大决定，包括降低 Xbox Game Pass 的价格以及将《战争机器：E-Day》和《发条革命》制作为 Xbox 主机独占游戏。但在他们的“重置”备忘录中，Sharma 和首席内容官 Matt Booty 讨论了 Xbox 业务面临的许多挑战，包括它的工作室系统“过度扩张”： > 我们是行业定义特许经营权的幸运管理者，这些特许经营权拥有巨大的潜力和玩家需求，但我们没有为它们提供足够的资金来竞争和获胜。与此同时，正如我们上周末在 Showcase 上看到的那样，可靠的第一方和第三方独家产品以及新 IP 对我们的成功至关重要。我们需要重新评估这些与我们未来五年的投资重点之间的平衡。上周，我的同事汤姆·沃伦 (Tom Warren) 报告称，Xbox 的变化可能“涉及关闭工作室，或改变 Xbox 工作室阵容”。 Xbox 没有立即回复置评请求。据《游戏商业》报道，该公司 Xbox 游戏工作室负责人 Craig Duncan 和 Xbox 游戏工作室办公室主任 Louise O’Connor 也宣布他们将离职。曾领导 Rare 的邓肯于 2024 年 10 月接任该职位。5 月，夏尔马重组了 Xbox 平台团队，包括引进了一些她曾在微软 CoreAI 团队共事过的高管。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
